SELECT value, floor(value) as floored_value FROM test_floors;
SELECT a.value, b.value, floor(a.value + b.value) as floored_sum FROM (SELECT value FROM test_floors) a, (SELECT value FROM test_floors) b WHERE a.value < 0 AND b.value > 0;
CREATE TABLE test_numbers (id INT PRIMARY KEY, number FLOAT);
SELECT id, floor(number) FROM test_numbers WHERE number < -5;
SELECT floor(number) FROM (SELECT number FROM test_numbers) AS subquery WHERE number IS NOT NULL;
